channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Sweden vs Tunisia: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Sweden vs Tunisia for free online and from anywhere as the two sides kick off their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign in a crucial Group F clash in Monterrey, Mexico.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, June 15 (game #1603)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, June 15 (game #1100)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, June 15 (game #834)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NASA's X-59 reaches speed and altitude milestones ahead of first quiet supersonic flights
item.description: The plane will soon be ready to fly over US communities.

item.title: EOFY sales will end in two weeks — grab these 65+ handpicked deals on TVs, laptops, headphones, vacuums and more before they disappear
item.description: Don't miss out on these excellent EOFY deals, with some record-low prices on Bose headphones, as well as massive savings on Dyson, Shark, Ninja, Apple and more.

item.title: "Our mobile phones have become the greatest spy on the planet" - quote of the day by antivirus pioneer John McAfee
item.description: The late cybersecurity entrepreneur often spoke on the aggressive encroachment of people's digital rights in the modern age

item.title: Startup CEO Charlie Javice is reportedly angling for a Trump pardon
item.description: JPMorgan can't be pleased by any of this.
